address.title: address
address.description: The full address, area name, or place text the user shared

latitude.title: latitude
latitude.description: Decimal latitude if the user shared a GPS pin, otherwise leave blank

locationName.title: locationName
locationName.description: Text location name if the user shared a GPS pin, otherwise leave blank

longitude.title: longitude
longitude.description: Decimal longitude if the user shared a GPS pin, otherwise leave blank
